dungeon._element_note: All Scrapyard monsters at D1 are neutral-element; Chameleon boss has 120 for all elements (unique among dungeons)

bossRooms.description: Boss room locations by depth (time required per room)

depth4.note: Requires completion of all NRDC (No Repeatable Dungeon Count) first

traps.name: Torches
traps.effect: Can be prevented with torches in inventory

traps.name: Holy Water Event
traps.effect: Holy water (with Rogue) unlocks highly valuable event reward

traps.name: Railgun
traps.effect: Shoots one random pet at start of each turn for damage (ignores defense). Pets killed cannot be revived by phoenix feathers in same room.
traps.formula: Damage increases with difficulty level. Specific formula unknown but ranges from 20k (D0) to 640,310 (D10)

traps.name: Darkness
traps.effect: Occurs in 100% of Depth 4 Scrapyard runs

traps.name: Burn
traps.effect: Occurs in 50% of Depth 4 Scrapyard rooms

rewards.scalingNote: One of the best sources of earlygame GP income

events.name: Floating Shrine

rewards.description: Valuable rewards; makes D3 Scrapyard better than D1 Mountain for event grinding

events._note: Requirements unclear; appears to be a positive event

requirements.pets: All 6 pets must match Neutral element (or specific element)

currency.godPower: Earned through events (e.g., 30 GP from Iron Path event)
currency.gp: Earned through Cursed Chest and other events in early depths

rewards._confidence_note: Material tier drops confirmed; exact drop rates and quantities unknown

earlygame.note: All-neutral starting team recommended for new players

midgame.note: Can use 'leftover' pets not selected for other dungeon teams
midgame.strategy: Focus on class variety and levels rather than elemental coverage

equipmentStrategy.focus: Avoid elemental weaknesses rather than maximize strengths
equipmentStrategy.recommendation: Use neutral gear and neutral gems
equipmentStrategy.detail: Scrapyard monsters attack using element most effective against pet, so defense-focused gear is critical

depth4._note: All pets should have at least 30k HP for D4 Difficulty 0

railgunSurvival.difficulty_10: 640k+ HP needed to survive base Railgun hit
railgunSurvival._note: Railgun damage scales dramatically with difficulty; mages become unviable due to insufficient HP

survivability.generalStrategy: Neutral pets have no elemental weakness and perform better in Scrapyard

chameleon.uniqueness: Different from other dungeons; all Chameleon variants have element-specific resistances

neutralElement.definition: Dungeon with no elemental affinity; monsters do not favor any single element
neutralElement.strategic: Requires balanced team rather than element-stacking

depth4: Golden Key (if aiming for Iron Path event)
Freezing Bombs (50% speed reduction; cannot combine with Nanotraps or keys)
itemsToEquip._note: Freezing Bombs conflict with key items; cannot be used together

knownBosses.name: Nothing (Hidden)
knownBosses.trigger: Place Nothing (item) + Hot Stone in item column

notes.strategyOverview: Scrapyard is the neutral dungeon requiring balanced defense without elemental advantages. Early-game GP farming is strong via Cursed Chest (D1). Depth 3 Floating Shrine makes it competitive with other dungeons for event farming. Depth 4 presents extreme difficulty spike due to unavoidable Railgun trap scaling to 640k+ damage at D10.
notes.earlygameValue: Best for earlygame GP generation via Cursed Chest (5% spawn, 5-10 GP per event)

dataGaps.trap_mechanics_d1_d3: Specific preventable traps not fully documented beyond torches/holy water for event unlocking
dataGaps.material_drop_rates: Exact quantities and drop percentages for tier 1-4 materials not provided in wiki
dataGaps.petStones: No information found on whether Scrapyard yields pet stones
dataGaps.difficulty_scaling: Railgun damage table incomplete (only D0=20k, D10=640,310 known)

_metadata.note: JSON structured for dungeon-level mechanics only. Individual enemy stat tables (Chameleon, Nanobot, etc.) should be populated separately.
